类 AbstractInventoryModule

java.lang.Object
com.zenith.module.api.ModuleUtils
com.zenith.module.api.Module
com.zenith.module.impl.AbstractInventoryModule
直接已知子类:
Auto128Bot, AutoEat, AutoFish, AutoMend, AutoOmen, AutoTotem, AutoVault, KillAura
public abstract class AbstractInventoryModule extends Module
Modules that follow a general pattern of equipping an item to a hotbar or offhand slot and using it
